title: WATINC Random 30Pcs DIY Animals Squeeze Toys for Kids White Mini Squeeze Toys Creamy Slow Rising Kawaii Soft Food Education for Keychains Phone Straps, Bonus Few Lanyard Random Stickers
features: 【Environmental Protection Material】All our Squeeze Toys are made of safe, non-polluting materials, polyurethane foam (PU foam),super soft with adorable looks and reassuring pillowy texture
【Pattern】Random 30 Pcs Mini Squeeze Toys; PS: PAINT IS NOT INCLUDED.

【Multifunctional】Benefiticial to relieve stress and anxiety and helps kids with autism or ADHD focus;to increase blood circulation of hands;can be used for interior decoration or giveaway gifts on Christmas or other festival
【Special Warning】DO NOT EAT!!!DO NOT TRY TO TEAR!!! Children under 3 years old should be taken care of by parents to avoid accidental swallowing (Product Is NOT Edible).
【We are always here to help】Please feel free to contact us if you find any quality problems.
description: Product Description Kawaii Squeeze Toys Our desire is to make every child who uses our toys having a happy childhood and they will be more and more clever. WATINC's Squeeze Toys are made of elastic soft silicone, toy materials are absolutely non-toxic, healthy, safe. Having a cute Squeeze Toys set is a good gift every child wants. They also can be charms for cellphones, collections, decorations, teaching tools etc. Squeeze Toys can effectively resist stress and vent your emotions, and the cute shape will make your mood better. How to clean? Use stickers to paste repeatedly to remove dust or use a little soap to wash it for a few minutes.Wi pe off the stains with cotton swab moistened with moisturizing emulsion or alcohol.
